nasb.text: Then he led me toward the south, and behold, there was a gate toward the south; and he measured its side pillars and its porches according to those same measurements.

esv.text: And he led me toward the south, and behold, there was a gate on the south. And he measured its jambs and its vestibule; they had the same size as the others.

cnv.text: 他領我向南走，我就看見朝南的門。他量了牆柱和門廊，大小與先前的一樣。

ccb.text: 他又带我到南门，量了墙柱和门廊，都与其他门的尺寸相同，
